Name: DAMAGE_OVER_WRITE_PARAM
Description: Defines override damage reaction types and forced motion states used to replace default hit reactions under specific attack conditions.

Fields.Name: No Motion
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with no animation or movement response.

Fields.Name: Tiny
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a very small hit animation.

Fields.Name: Small Knockback
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a small knockback animation.

Fields.Name: Large Knockback
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a large knockback animation.

Fields.Name: Very Large
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a very large hit animation.

Fields.Name: Blow Away
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a launch or blow-away animation.

Fields.Name: Launch Upward
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with an upward launch animation.

Fields.Name: Breath
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a breath-type stagger animation.

Fields.Name: Stumble
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a stumble or trip animation.

Fields.Name: Collapse
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a collapsing animation.

Fields.Name: Aerial Knockdown
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with an airborne knockdown animation.

Fields.Name: Knockdown
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a grounded knockdown animation.

Fields.Name: Downed Attack
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction for attacks performed against downed targets.

Fields.Name: Ladder
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction while the target is on a ladder.

Fields.Name: Rope
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction while the target is attached to or interacting with a rope.

Fields.Name: Parry Break
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a parry break animation.

Fields.Name: Guard Break
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a guard break animation.

Fields.Name: Stun
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a stun animation.

Fields.Name: Bleeding
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a bleeding animation.

Fields.Name: Grab
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a grabbed or captured animation.

Fields.Name: Headshot
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a headshot-specific animation.

Fields.Name: Small Falling Damage
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a small falling damage animation.

Fields.Name: Large Falling Damage
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a large falling damage animation.

Fields.Name: Small Aerial Damage
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a small airborne damage animation.

Fields.Name: Large Aerial Damage
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction with a large airborne damage animation.

Fields.Name: Ground Jump Impact
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction caused by a jumping attack impacting the ground.

Fields.Name: Aerial Jump Impact
Fields.Description: Overrides the damage reaction caused by a midair jumping attack impact.
